messages.text:
What it is: Three features shipped, closed and STILL INVISIBLE to the human — find out why a done ticket doesn't reach him
What it solves: THE REPORTS. Each POST-DATES the fix that was supposed to deliver it — that is the whole point.
  1. "The diagrams in the daily email are still not rendered" (2026-07-12T03:24Z).
     BL-286 (email images must be cid inline attachments, not data-URIs) merged 2026-07-11 13:41
     — FOURTEEN HOURS B…
How it works: Each report is checked against the surface the human actually looks at
